_comment: KIA connectors — same shape as Claude's MCP config. Copy to data/connectors.json (native: C:\dev\data\connectors.json), fill secrets, set CONNECTORS_ENABLED=true. Servers launch over stdio via npx/uvx. The first seven need NO API keys. Ambient chat only ever sees READ-ONLY tools (see brain_connectors.client.is_readonly_tool); writes require the explicit /connectors or /agent surfaces. Connections are pooled per process and reload automatically when this file changes.

filesystem._comment: File access rooted at the listed directories. Use native paths (C:\dev) on Windows, /app/data under Docker.

fetch._comment: Fetch & read arbitrary web pages as markdown (Python, via uvx).

web-search._comment: DuckDuckGo search — no API key required.

memory._comment: Persistent knowledge-graph memory (entities/relations). Survives restarts via MEMORY_FILE_PATH.

sequential-thinking._comment: Structured step-by-step reasoning scratchpad — helps the planner on multi-step tasks.

_disabled_brave-search._comment: Alternative web search with an API key (rename to 'web-search' to use).

_disabled_slack._comment: Rename to 'slack' and fill tokens to enable.

_disabled_notion._comment: Rename to 'notion'; create an internal integration at notion.so/my-integrations and share pages with it.

_note_disabled: Entries prefixed _disabled_ are launched too (the manager tries every entry) but fail fast and are skipped. Prefer deleting entries you don't use; the prefix just keeps the reference handy.
_note_github: @modelcontextprotocol/server-github is deprecated on npm but functional. Long-term, consider GitHub's official MCP server (github.com/github/github-mcp-server).
